name: Boots of the Borealis Monarch
setBonus: Borealis Monarch: Increase damage on Frozen enemies by 50%. Also, Critical Hit Damage is increased by 10% for all party members for 8 seconds after Cold Snap usage.

name: Boots of the Flame Leper
setBonus: Flame Leper: Inflicting Toxic on an enemy 3 times transforms the status into Blightfire which deals more damage over time.
